content:
Chicago Police Department - Incident Report
RD #: HZ430046
DOMESTIC INFO
NARRATIVE
EVENT#14460; IN SUMMARY, RO WAS ASSIGNED THE PAPER FOR AN ONVIEW PERSON DOWN BY BEAT 4563A, AT MONROE AND KENTON. UPON ARRIVAL, RO SPOKE WITH BEAT 4563A, P.O TRUESDALE #11035 AND P.O SMITH #16181, WHO RELATED THEY WERE ASSIGNED PEZ ZONE 13, BOX (A) AND WERE TOURING THE AREA. P.O TRUESDALE #11035 KNEW THE AREA TO BE KNOWN FOR PROSTITUTION ACTIVITY AND OBSERVED AN UNK M/1, OFFENDER(S)-NO DETAILS(OFFENDER), JUMPING OVER A FENCED IN SECURE AREA, LOCATED AT 4557 W. MONROE. P.O TRUESDALE #11035 ATTEMPTED TO CONDUCT A FIELD INVESTIGATION, HOWEVER THE UNK M/1 BEGAN TO FLEE ON FOOT S/B DOWNS ADAMS AND THEN W/B TOWARDS KENTON (OVER THE TRAIN TRACKS). P.O SMITH #16181 ALSO OBSERVED THE UNK M/1 OFFENDER AND DESCRIBES HIM AS A M/1, APPROX. 20-30 YOA; 5'09-6'00; WITH LONG DREADLOCKS/BRAIDS; WEARING ALL DARK CLOTHING. P.O TRUESDALE#11035 LOOKED INTO THE ENCLOSED FENCED IN AREA WERE THE OFFENDER WAS SEEN EXITING AND OBSERVED AN UNK M/1 JOHN DOE (VICTIM) UNRESPONSIVE. BEAT 4563A GAVE A FLASH MESSAGE AND TOURED THE AREA WITH NEGATIVE RESULTS. RO OBSERVED AN UNK M/1- F/1, APPROX. 25-30 YOA; 5'7-5'10; 150-190LBS; WITH SHORT BLACK HAIR AND A LACERATION WOUND TO THE NECK. TRUCK 26 AND CFD #23 ARRIVED ON SCENE AT 2135 HRS, AT WHICH TIME DR. LEWIS, AT STROGER HOSPITAL, PRONOUNCED THE VICTIM AT 2150HRS. ON SCENE: BEAT 1110, PH1, 1115A, 1125, 1113A, 4563, 4715, 6545A, 4757, 6545C, 1140, 1163D, 1113, 4737, 4730, 5334, 5314: DECT. SPANOS#2120, 5843: E/T NORRIS #19686. NOTIFICATIONS: DESK SGT. 1101 AT 2141 HRS, AREA NORTH: DECT. ORTMAN #20766 AT 2135 HRS, CPIC. P.O DOUGHERTY#5329 AT 2145 HRS, CRIME LAB. P.O OCONNELL #14403 AT 2155 HRS, NEWS AFFAIRS. P.O ZALA#12684, M/E. P.O BRIGGS #76 AT 2257 HRS (M/E CASE#2016-04427). BEAT 1141 ASSIGNED THE CRIME SCENE. - STAR#: 7707 NAME: CHRISTINA GONZALEZ BEAT: 1114
